items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a customer waits for sold-out group events. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete details or outcomes related to this specific scenario, nor does it confirm that the system supports such functionality. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the waitlisting process, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this persona scenario.
